productDisplayName: Clarks Women Black Cocoa Creme Shoes
description: Innocently girly, these  ballerina flats from clarks are designed for high fashion comfort. Wear this with any off-duty or formal ensemble to add a whimsical twist with this low-top pair's cute bow on the toe box. UpperGenuine leather upper with a fabric bow detail on the toe boxSlip-on styling Soft sockliner for instep comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with a circular lug at the heelFloral patterned grooves on the forefoot for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not store under direct sunlight
